name: ghost-agent-workflow
description: Codex skills for versioned parallel planning, profile-bound thread coordination, scoped workers, and safe Git commits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan parallel work, enforce worker profiles, and commit safely.
interface.longDescription: Packages parallel-task-planner, thread-coordination, thread-goal-worker, and git-commit. Parallel execution flows through versioned plans, model and reasoning profiles are verified before dispatch, workers remain inside scoped goals, and reviewed changes are committed in the required order.
defaultPrompt: Use $parallel-task-planner to generate a versioned parallel plan with complete worker profiles.
Use $thread-coordination to execute a validated parallel-task-planner plan path.
Use $thread-goal-worker for the single scoped module dispatched by the coordinator.
Use $git-commit to analyze current changes and commit them.
